title: Immunofluorescence Protocol for Pax7 and Androgen Receptor in Frozen Muscle Sections
author: Hiroshi Sakai
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.sujeeun
materials: Dilute primary antibodies as follows in 5% Goat serum/0.05% Triton X-100/PBS. Prepare 100 µl antibody solution per slide. Add primary antibody solution to the slides. 100 µL, 5% Goat serum/0.05% Triton X-100/PBS 5 µL, anti-Pax7 (mouse IgG1, 1/20) 0.25 µL, anti-androgen receptor (rabbit, 1/400)

Dilute secondary antibodies as follows in 5% Goat serum/0.05% Triton X-100/PBS. Prepare 100 µl antibody solution per slide. Add secondary antibody solution to the slides. undetermined, 5% Goat serum/0.05% Triton X-100/PBS 0.1 µL, anti-mouse IgG1 568 (1/1000) undetermined, anti-rabbit IgG 488 (1/1000) undetermined, DAPI (1/2000)

steps.title: Fix the slides with 4% PFA/PBS...
steps.instruction: Fix the slides with 4% PFA/PBS for 5 min at room temperature. Do not air dry the samples before fixing. It may increase the background signal and lose androgen receptoer signal.

steps.title: Wash the slides in PBS three times for 5 min
steps.instruction: Wash the slides in PBS three times for 5 min.

steps.title: Place the slides into a slide chamber in PBS
steps.instruction: Place the slides into a slide chamber in PBS

steps.title: Fill a beaker with 500 ml of Sodium citrate
steps.instruction: Fill a beaker with 500 ml of Sodium citrate.

steps.title: Place the beaker on the hotplate...
steps.instruction: Place the beaker on the hotplate and turn it on full power. While wating for the beaker to come to a boil, keep the sections in PBS.

steps.title: Once boiling, transfer the slides from PBS to the beaker
steps.instruction: Once boiling, transfer the slides from PBS to the beaker. Use care with hot solution. Use forceps.

steps.title: Remove the beaker from the hotplate...
steps.instruction: Remove the beaker from the hotplate and let the beaker cool for 20 min.

steps.title: Remove the slide chamber from the beaker
steps.instruction: Remove the slide chamber from the beaker.

steps.title: Wash slides in PBS three times for 5 min
steps.instruction: Wash slides in PBS three times for 5 min.

steps.title: Block the slides with 5% Goat serum/0
steps.instruction: Block the slides with 5% Goat serum/0.05% Triton X-100/PBS for 1h at room temperature. Prepare 100 µl of 5% Goat serum/0.05% Triton X-100/PBS per slide.

steps.title: Drain the slides for a few...
steps.instruction: Drain the slides for a few seconds (do not rinse) and wipe around the sections with tissue paper.

steps.title: Wash the slides in PBS three times for 5 min
steps.instruction: Wash the slides in PBS three times for 5 min.

steps.title: Incubate for 1h at room temperature protected from light
steps.instruction: Incubate for 1h at room temperature protected from light.

steps.title: Wash the slides in PBS three times for 5 min
steps.instruction: Wash the slides in PBS three times for 5 min.

steps.title: Mount using ProLong™ Glass Antifade Mountant and add coverslips
steps.instruction: Mount using ProLong™ Glass Antifade Mountant and add coverslips.
